description: Prevents nearby allied deaths on a cooldown. Saved allies are briefly invulnerable.
tooltipTemplate: When a nearby ally within {triggerRadius} would die, restore {healAmount} HP and grant {protectionDurationSeconds:1}s of invulnerability. {cooldownSeconds:0}s cooldown.
Every heal you cast also restores {splashHealPercent%} of the heal amount to allies within {splashRadius}. Splash heals do not chain.

description: Healing detonates holy damage around the healed unit.
tooltipTemplate: Every heal you cast deals Holy damage equal to the full heal amount to enemies within {radius} of the healed unit. Triggers even at full HP and on overheal.
